title: NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
shortInfo: National Institute of Technology Meghalaya (NIT Meghalaya) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Meghalaya. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Meghalaya (NIT Meghalaya) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Meghalaya. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.E. in VLSI, microelectronics, or related disciplines with experience in EDA tools, M.Sc. with valid GATE/NET qualification, GATE-qualified B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering or related disciplines, Knowledge of EDA tools is preferable
qualification.details: M.Tech./M.E. in VLSI, microelectronics, or related disciplines with experience in EDA tools. M.Sc. with valid GATE/NET qualification. GATE-qualified candidates with a B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering or related disciplines. Knowledge of EDA tools is preferable.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the NIT Meghalaya recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the NIT Meghalaya recruitment is Junior Research Fellow (JRF).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is Rs. 37000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications include M.Tech./M.E. in VLSI, microelectronics, or related disciplines with experience in EDA tools, or M.Sc. with valid GATE/NET qualification, or GATE-qualified B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering or related disciplines. Knowledge of EDA tools is preferable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the walk-in date for the interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in date for the interview is 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test and an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the NIT Meghalaya located?
faq.answer: NIT Meghalaya is located in Sohra, Meghalaya, with the pincode 793108.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).
